provenance.note: Synthetic placeholder so CI can run before a real `just eval-record` against claude. Replace with real recording before treating any score as a measurement.

text:
1. If an unremoved event-listener registry is the cause, then detaching listeners on job completion will flatten the heap curve.
2. If the response cache is the cause, then capping it at 1000 entries will stop the growth.
3. If a closure retaining request buffers is the cause, then nulling the buffer reference after flush will stop the leak.
